svg.title: EV3 FADEC architecture diagram
svg.desc: Shows the complete FADEC system architecture using a LEGO Mindstorms EV3 brick as the engine controller, with Simulink on a PC for development and tuning, three EV3 motors connected to the CFM LEAP engine model, and EV3 sensors for additional inputs.

g.text: FADEC runs here — standalone after deploy
Simulink deploys FADEC model to EV3 brick (WiFi/USB) — no bridge script needed
EV3 brick runs control loop standalone at ~50 Hz, reads encoders, drives motors
Motor A (large) — PID-controlled fan speed; Motor C (large) — throttle encoder input
